title: hyptis tumidicalyx
intro: Hyptis tumidicalyx, also known as Brazilian hyptis, is a plant species in the Lamiaceae family, commonly found in the tropical regions of Central and South America. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Hyptis tumidicalyx include treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis, coughs, and colds, as well as skin conditions like eczema and acne. Hyptis tumidicalyx can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion for its herbal benefits, making it a popular natural remedy in traditional medicine.
